summary: Phase 2 testing (notifications + edit profile). Backend: 13/13 pytest tests passed (avisos list/count/marcar-leidos/single mark, eco/comentario/respuesta/seguidor aviso creation including no-self-notify and respuesta→parent-author-not-relato-owner routing, PUT /api/usuarios/perfil with persistence). Frontend: Playwright e2e for keilin@chronos.com — AvisosBadge shows count, /avisos page renders header + 'Probar sonido' pill, Todos/No leídos filters, 6 rows listed; auto-mark-as-read at 1.5s works (No-leídos tab shows 'Estás al día con todos los avisos' empty state); clicking aviso navigates to /relato/:id; profile-edit-btn opens EditProfileModal with all 4 inputs (nombre/bio/interes/tema) + submit/cancel/close buttons; modal closes via submit, cancel, and backdrop click; bio and tema persisted and visible on profile after save.
critical_code_review_comments: server.js now 1052 lines — exceeds the soft 1000-line threshold mentioned in iteration 2 (was 916). Strongly recommend splitting before Phase 3 lands: routes/avisos.js, routes/comentarios.js, routes/usuarios.js, routes/relatos.js. The single-file pattern is approaching maintainability risk.

PUT /api/usuarios/perfil uses `if (bio)` etc. which means passing an empty string ('') to clear a field is silently ignored. If the UX expects users to be able to clear bio/interes, switch to `if (bio !== undefined)`. Same for nombre/interes/tema_favorito. Currently the EditProfileModal sends all 4 fields always, so passing '' for bio is dropped — bug-prone if frontend ever wants to clear.

PUT /api/usuarios/perfil does not validate field lengths or trim input on server side. Frontend enforces maxLength via attribute but a direct API client could send a 10MB string. Add `body('bio').isLength({ max: 220 }).trim()` etc. like the auth endpoints.

POST /api/avisos/:id/leido does not return 404 when the aviso doesn't exist or belongs to another user — it silently returns 200 even when updateOne matched 0 docs. Consider checking result.matchedCount and returning 404 to give clearer feedback.

crearAviso(seguir) does not include publicacion_id so the AvisosPage navigation falls back: tipo='seguidor' goes to /perfil/actorId which is correct, but the aviso row text 'X es ahora parte de tu legado' has no link target for non-seguidor types when publicacion_id is missing. Currently only 'seguidor' lacks publicacion_id so it's fine, but worth a defensive check in handleAvisoClick (already present: `aviso.publicacion_id?._id`).

AvisosBadge polls every 25s, but on Tab switch back the badge does not refresh until next poll. Consider adding a `document.addEventListener('visibilitychange')` listener that calls fetchCount when tab becomes visible — cheap UX win.
No rate limiting on POST /api/avisos/marcar-leidos or /api/comentarios — a user could spam comments creating many avisos quickly. Low priority for an MVP but worth flagging.
Notificacion model: `archivo` tipo is in the enum but no endpoint currently creates one. Either implement archivado-notifications or remove the enum value to avoid dead code.
test_credentials: keilin@chronos.com / chronos123 (A), arqueo@chronos.com / chronos123 (B), legado@chronos.com / chronos123 (C). All from /app/memory/test_credentials.md + /app/backend/seed.js.
seed_data_creation: Tests leave residual data in MongoDB: TEST_phase2 comments on keilin's first relato (root + reply), a bio update 'TEST_phase2 UI bio update <ts>' and interes 'Mitología romana TEST' on keilin's profile, plus a follow B→A relationship that may be 'seguir' or 'deseguir' depending on prior state. Avisos generated by tests remain in DB. Consider a cleanup step before next iteration if accumulation matters.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 fully verified. Endpoints: GET /api/avisos (populated actor_id + publicacion_id, sorted desc), GET /api/avisos/no-leidos/count {total}, POST /api/avisos/marcar-leidos, POST /api/avisos/:id/leido, PUT /api/usuarios/perfil. Aviso creation triggers verified for: eco (no self-notify), comentario root, respuesta (routes to parent comment author NOT relato owner), seguidor. Frontend testids confirmed: topbar-notif-btn, avisos-badge, avisos-page, test-sound-btn, avisos-filter-todos, avisos-filter-no-leidos, avisos-list, aviso-<id>, aviso-dot-<id>, profile-edit-btn, edit-profile-modal, edit-profile-backdrop, edit-input-nombre/bio/interes/tema, edit-profile-submit/cancel/close. Web Audio is suspended in headless Chrome but playChronosTestChime/playChronosAlert calls do not throw (verified). Audio output cannot be programmatically verified in headless; manual verification needed on real browser. Phase 3 (efemerides calendar) not yet tested.
